title: UTA Board Detail
description: Drill-down view for a single board slot. Shows all numeric parsed variables as individual time series, raw log lines, and session metadata.

list.name: slot_id
list.label: Slot (Board)
list.description: The board slot — e.g. R7S3-09. Set automatically when clicking from the Rack & Board Monitor.
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT slot_id FROM uta.test_sessions FINAL ORDER BY slot_id

list.name: log_filename
list.label: Log File
list.description: Which log file to inspect. Filtered to the selected slot.
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT log_filename FROM uta.test_sessions FINAL WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' ORDER BY log_filename DESC

list.name: metric_key
list.label: Metric Keys
list.description: Which parsed keys to overlay (multi-select). Leave as All to show every numeric key.
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT key FROM uta.log_events ARRAY JOIN mapKeys(parsed) AS key WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND isNotNull(toFloat64OrNull(mapValues(parsed)[indexOf(mapKeys(parsed), key)])) ORDER BY key

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() FROM uta.log_events WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime AND ingested_at <= $__toTime
SELECT count() FROM uta.log_events WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND severity IN ('ERROR','FATAL') AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime AND ingested_at <= $__toTime

panels.title: Distinct Parsed Keys
panels.description: Number of unique field names extracted from this board's log lines

targets.rawSql: SELECT countDistinct(key) FROM uta.log_events ARRAY JOIN mapKeys(parsed) AS key WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime AND ingested_at <= $__toTime
SELECT status FROM uta.test_sessions FINAL WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' ORDER BY last_seen_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT dateDiff('minute', started_at, now()) FROM uta.test_sessions FINAL WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' ORDER BY last_seen_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT concat(platform, ' / ', firmware_version) FROM uta.test_sessions FINAL WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' ORDER BY last_seen_at DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: 📈 All Numeric Parsed Variables — Time Series
panels.description: Every numeric key-value pair extracted from the parsed Map column for this board, plotted as individual series over time. Use the 'Metric Keys' filter above to focus on specific variables.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfMinute(ingested_at)             AS time,
  key                                       AS metric,
  avg(toFloat64OrZero(value))               AS value
FROM uta.log_events
ARRAY JOIN
  mapKeys(parsed)   AS key,
  mapValues(parsed) AS value
WHERE
  slot_id = '${slot_id}'
  AND log_filename LIKE '%${log_filename:raw}%'
  AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime
  AND ingested_at <= $__toTime
  AND isNotNull(toFloat64OrNull(value))
  AND key LIKE '%${metric_key:raw}%'
GROUP BY time, key
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Log Event Rate (lines/min)
panels.description: Total log lines ingested per minute for this board

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(ingested_at) AS time, count() AS lines_per_min FROM uta.log_events WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime AND ingested_at <= $__toTime GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Severity Rate (errors/min)
panels.description: ERROR + FATAL lines per minute — spikes indicate test failures or device issues

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(ingested_at) AS time, severity, count() AS cnt FROM uta.log_events WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND severity IN ('ERROR','FATAL','WARN') AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime AND ingested_at <= $__toTime GROUP BY time, severity ORDER BY time

panels.title: Parsed Key-Value Snapshot — Latest 200 Lines
panels.description: Exploded view of every parsed key-value pair extracted from raw log lines. Numeric values are cast for easy inspection.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ingested_at AS time, line_number, key, value FROM uta.log_events ARRAY JOIN mapKeys(parsed) AS key, mapValues(parsed) AS value WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND log_filename LIKE '%${log_filename:raw}%' AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime AND ingested_at <= $__toTime ORDER BY ingested_at DESC LIMIT 200

panels.title: Parsed Key Statistics
panels.description: For each distinct parsed key: how many lines contained it, and min/max/avg of its numeric value.

targets.rawSql: SELECT key, count() AS occurrences, countIf(isNotNull(toFloat64OrNull(value))) AS numeric_count, round(avg(toFloat64OrZero(value)), 4) AS avg_value, round(min(toFloat64OrZero(value)), 4) AS min_value, round(max(toFloat64OrZero(value)), 4) AS max_value FROM uta.log_events ARRAY JOIN mapKeys(parsed) AS key, mapValues(parsed) AS value WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND log_filename LIKE '%${log_filename:raw}%' AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime AND ingested_at <= $__toTime GROUP BY key ORDER BY occurrences DESC

panels.title: Raw Log Lines
panels.description: Full raw log lines for this board — newest first. Filter by severity using the dashboard time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ingested_at AS time, raw_line AS line, map('severity', severity, 'line_no', toString(line_number), 'file', log_filename) AS labels FROM uta.log_events WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND log_filename LIKE '%${log_filename:raw}%' AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime AND ingested_at <= $__toTime ORDER BY ingested_at DESC LIMIT 500
